title: Sqlitelogictest: select query with NOT IN giving wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (value, description) VALUES (100, 'First entry'), (NULL, 'Second entry'), (200, 'Third entry');
CREATE TABLE reference_table (ref_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ref_value INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT ref_value FROM reference_table WHERE ref_id < 3) OR description IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT query with NOT IN returning incorrect results
